title: Loki’s Shadow Over the Island
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Giants as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're a pirate, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WANT YOU TO UNDO MY CHAINS BY DAWN.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The key is somewhere in the village.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In return, I'll wipe out any pirate crew you want.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make sure to not leave a trace. Sounds good, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I CAN'T FORCE YOU MYSELF, BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah! I almost forgot to say!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the realm of the dead, you see. The lowest layer of Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a place no one dares to approach.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Criminals and the condemned are dropped down here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's a prison and an execution ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you dig up the snow around here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll find the bones of countless humans and giants.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These things have lived on this mountain for thousands of years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: In our legends, they also call this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The "First World!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And this world of the dead belongs to the sun, you foolish human!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know what brought you to this forsaken mountain,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you should watch your step around these beasts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mumble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They often come up here to see their master...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mumble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's because I defended them when I was a kid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This sure is nostalgic!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, if you cross me, these guys won't take that lightly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same fate is in store for any puny human who dares to defy Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your only salvation from being devoured is to dress yourself in putrid smelling clothes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TO LIVE AND SERVE AS A WALKING CORPSE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can he have tamed the mountain beasts?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Master! That's a little harsh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is this guy? Is it okay if we let him get torn apart? Does he have anything good on him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Also, we apologize for failing earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of us expected him to show up...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: that Emperor... red-haired shanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Did you say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...Shanks?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, but... this can't be!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! Who the hell is this little guy?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shanks came here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You know him???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did he come??? We're talking about that coward of a pirate, right?

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
